title: Why I Stopped Recommending Alternatives to Selling Digital Downloads in Pakistan — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: As a creator in Pakistan, I've seen countless digital entrepreneurs struggle to sell their ebooks and digital products internationally due to PayPal restrictions. The popular advice to use alternatives like Payoneer or Skrill has led many down a dead-end road. I'm here to tell you the harsh truth: these solutions don't work, and it's time to look elsewhere. The country's banking restrictions and lack of trust in online payment systems make it a nightmare to receive payments from international buyers. I used to recommend alternatives, but after years of watching creators struggle, I've come to a realization.
The Honest Reality Most Creators Avoid

The reality is that most alternatives to PayPal require a bank account, which is often a barrier for creators in Pakistan who don't have access to reliable banking services. They promise to work around these issues, but in reality, they only lead to more problems. Creators end up with unfulfilled orders, delayed payments, or even worse, losing money to scammers. The constant stress and uncertainty make it challenging to focus on creating valuable content and building a loyal customer base.
Why the Popular Advice Is Wrong

I used to recommend using platforms like Payoneer or Skrill, thinking they would solve the problem. However, these solutions require a physical address, which many creators in Pakistan don't have. Moreover, they often come with hefty fees, which eat into the creator's profits. It's like trying to put a band-aid on a bullet wound. The underlying issue remains, and the creator is left to deal with the consequences.
What the Data and Experience Actually Show

After years of working with creators in Pakistan, I've seen that the best solution is to use a blockchain-based payment system that doesn't require a bank account or PayPal. The data shows that these systems are more secure, reliable, and cost-effective. They also provide instant automated delivery, which ensures that creators receive payments on time. I've seen creators increase their sales and build a loyal customer base using these systems.
Blockchain-based payment systems are the future of digital commerce in Pakistan.
The Uncomfortable Truth About Your Options

The uncomfortable truth is that most creators in Pakistan are not using the right payment system. They're stuck in the past, relying on outdated solutions that don't work. It's time to wake up and smell the coffee. The best payment systems are those that are decentralized, secure, and reliable. They're the ones that don't require a bank account or PayPal. If you're a creator in Pakistan, it's time to explore these options and leave the past behind.
What You Should Do Based on All of This
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

Traditional payment systems like PayPal and Payoneer are a thing of the past.
